title: 522. A Cat, a Chinese Guy and My Father
original_title: 522. Un gato, un chino y mi padre
overview: George, an agoraphobic young woman, cannot go more than 522 steps away from her home. One day, a personal tragedy forces her to embark on a journey from Spain to her native Portugal. Along the way, George's whole world begins to widen…
